name: Birendra Rout
title: Head-HR Weaverbird Engineering & Technology
subject: Software Engineer Opportunity at Weaverbird Engineering & Technology
body:
Hi Birendra,

I hope you're doing well. I'm Manikanta Gururam, a Computer Science graduate with hands-on production experience in Python and Django development.

I'm reaching out to check if there are any current or upcoming Software Engineer roles at Weaverbird Engineering & Technology where my background could be useful.

Recently, I worked on production HRMS modules using Django and MySQL, and also built and deployed a full-stack web application end to end. My core skills include Python, Django, Django REST Framework, FastAPI, JavaScript, PostgreSQL/MySQL, and Git.

I'd be happy to share my resume if my profile looks relevant, and I'd be glad to connect briefly if there's a suitable opening.

Best regards,
Manikanta Gururam
+91 9912303719
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/manikanta-gururam
